{"CommandLine":"python -m pip install PyPDF2
python -c "
import PyPDF2
import os

pdf_path = r'g:\My Drive\UCL\BSMA\BSMA ANTIGRAVITY\01_Academic_Papers\[75] Yuma Akaho (2024) Conceptualizing the adventure tourist as a cross-boundary learner.pdf'

text = ''
with open(pdf_path, 'rb') as f:
    reader = PyPDF2.PdfReader(f)
    for i in range(min(5, len(reader.pages))): # read first 5 pages
        text += reader.pages[i].extract_text() + '\n'

print('--- Akaho Extract ---')
print(text[:1500])
